description_long: This is a cylindrical, upright trash bin with a dark green exterior and a subtle, horizontal gold band encircling its upper section. The body is smooth with minimal surface detailing, except for a single side that features a gold pictogram of a person disposing of trash, enclosed in a circle. The top of the bin is open, revealing a dark interior, suggesting it is designed for easy waste disposal without a lid. The bin appears robust and is likely constructed from metal or heavy-duty plastic, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks or sidewalks. There are no visible handles, wheels, or additional compartments, emphasizing a simple, functional design. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on durability and ease of use.
description: A dark green, cylindrical trash bin with a gold band and a waste disposal pictogram, featuring an open top and a sturdy, minimalist design.
description_view_0: A plain side of the green cylindrical trash bin with a gold band near the top, no visible signage.
description_view_1: Another plain side of the bin, identical to view 0, showing the gold band and smooth surface.
description_view_2: The front side of the bin, displaying the gold pictogram of a person throwing trash, along with the gold band.
description_view_3: A plain side similar to views 0 and 1, with the gold band visible and no signage.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Gold pictogram of a person disposing of trash on one side
